backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the car price prediction backend, defining types for car specs, price predictions, and history storage, while integrating file storage and authorization mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping feature IDs and titles to their associated source files, components, and test IDs for the gesture piano and car price prediction application.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend source files, describing the purpose and key details of each component, hook, config, and documentation file in the project.
frontend/COLAB_FRONTEND_RUN_GUIDE.md: Guide explaining how to run only the React frontend in Google Colab, noting that the Internet Computer Motoko backend cannot run in Colab and providing step-by-step Node.js setup instructions.
frontend/COLAB_PYTHON_MEGA_CODE.py: Self-contained Python script for Google Colab that installs dependencies, generates a synthetic car dataset, trains multiple ML models, and provides an interactive price prediction form with USD and INR output.
frontend/COLAB_PYTHON_RUN_GUIDE.md: Step-by-step guide for running the standalone Python car price prediction ML script in Google Colab, covering setup, execution, and expected output.
frontend/COMPLETE_CODE_COPY_PASTE.md: Documentation offering two copy-paste paths: a Colab-only Python ML option and a full Internet Computer project export, with instructions for both reconstruction methods.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the application.
frontend/index.html: Main HTML entry point with SEO meta tags, Open Graph, and Twitter Card tags for the Car Price Prediction System, loading the React app via Vite.
frontend/MEGA_FILE_EXPORT.md: Describes the mega-file export format for the project and provides instructions for reconstructing the complete application from a single pre-generated text file.
frontend/mega-export.txt: A generated single-file export containing the complete source code of the Car Price Prediction System (frontend and backend), with file markers for reconstruction.
frontend/PRODUCTION_DEPLOYMENT.md: Production deployment guide for the Car Price Prediction System on the Internet Computer, covering pre-deployment checklists for code quality, user flows, UI/UX, and SEO verification.
frontend/public/robots.txt: Standard robots.txt allowing all crawlers, specifying the sitemap URL and a crawl delay of 1 second.
frontend/public/sitemap.xml: XML sitemap with a single entry for the car price predictor homepage, set to weekly change frequency and priority 1.0.
frontend/README.md: Developer documentation for the Car Price Prediction System, describing quick start options including running the ML model in Google Colab or setting up the full Internet Computer application locally.
frontend/scripts/generate-mega-file.ts: TypeScript script that recursively walks the project directory and concatenates all matching source files into a single mega export file with clear delimiters.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up React Query, theme provider, and Internet Identity authentication, conditionally rendering the Header, Footer, ProfileSetup, or GesturePiano based on auth and profile state.
frontend/src/components/About.tsx: Renders an 'About' section for a car price prediction app, displaying project overview, founder info, and contact email fetched from an API.
frontend/src/components/AdminDashboard.t: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders a site footer for 'Gesture Piano' with copyright year, a caffeine.ai attribution link, and a GitHub icon link.
frontend/src/components/GesturePiano.tsx: Main layout component for the Gesture Piano app, composing the webcam feed, piano keyboard, and volume control with shared active notes state.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Renders a header with the Gesture Piano branding and an Internet Identity login/logout button that manages authentication state.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Renders a full-screen hero section for the car price prediction app with animated backgrounds, CTA buttons, a hero image, and feature highlights.
frontend/src/components/LoginForm.tsx: Displays a login card for the Car Price Predictor that authenticates users via Internet Identity, showing loading states and toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/PianoKeyboard.ts: Renders a visual two-octave piano keyboard (C4–C6) with white and black keys that highlight visually when their note is in the activeNotes prop.
frontend/src/components/PredictionForm.t: A React form component that collects car specifications (brand, year, mileage, fuel type, etc.) and submits them to a price prediction mutation, displaying validation errors via toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/Products.tsx: An empty component file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetup.tsx: A React form component for collecting a user's name and email to create their profile, using the `useSaveCallerUserProfile` mutation and showing success/error toasts.
frontend/src/components/SEOHead.tsx: A side-effect-only React component that injects a JSON-LD structured data script tag into the document head for SEO purposes, describing the Car Price Prediction System application.
An empty component file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/components/VolumeControl.ts: A UI component rendering a volume slider with a dynamic icon and percentage label, supporting mute toggle and volume change callbacks.
frontend/src/components/WebcamFeed.tsx: A React component that manages a webcam feed with hand tracking, translating detected hand gestures into piano note play/stop audio events and displaying camera status and FPS.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using the current Internet Identity, initializing access control and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAudioPlayer.ts: A custom hook that provides piano-like note playback using the Web Audio API with additive synthesis and ADSR envelopes, supporting play, stop, and volume control for individual notes.
frontend/src/hooks/useHandTracking.ts: A React hook that initializes MediaPipe Hands via CDN, processes webcam frames to detect hand landmarks, draws them on a canvas, and returns tracking state including landmarks, isTracking, and error.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating backend data including user profiles, contact info, car price predictions, and prediction history via an actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind base/components/utilities, defines a music-themed color palette with CSS custom properties for light and dark modes, and adds custom keyframe animations.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/utils/gestureRecognition.ts: Detects hand gestures from MediaPipe landmarks to determine which musical notes to play, mapping hand horizontal position across 25 notes (C4–C6) with finger-extension checks and per-hand debouncing.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom OKLCH-based color tokens (primary, sidebar, music-*, chart, etc.), border radius, accordion keyframes, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata describing a fix request for a hand gesture piano app, listing four existing features to audit and fix: WebcamFeed/MediaPipe initialization, useAudioPlayer sample loading with oscillator fallback, gesture recognition landmark-to-note mapping, and GesturePiano layout/active-note rendering.
